ratingResult.rationale: The specification is complete enough for parser, linter, author, evaluator, and report-renderer implementation. Scalar bounds remain intentionally broad, so the result satisfies the requirement without reaching outstanding.

findings.observation: The document structure, frontmatter schema, body semantics, evaluation semantics, report semantics, and extensions are all defined in one specification.
Model, Rating Scale, Target, Factor, and Requirement shapes define requiredness, cardinality, inheritance/default source behavior, and malformed-value handling.
Scalar placeholders such as <string> and <level-name> intentionally do not define detailed character-set or length bounds, leaving edge cases to conforming tools.
